name: Baked Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 5 chicken breast halves, boned and skinned
2 tablespoons butter or margarine (such as unsalted butter)
10 3/4 ounces cream of chicken soup (or cream of celery)
1/4 teaspoon garlic powder or garlic salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken breasts and pat them dry. Place them in a Crock-Pot.
2. In a saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients (butter/margarine, soup, sherry, rosemary, worcestershire sauce, garlic powder/salt) and heat until smooth and hot.
3. Pour the sauce over the chicken breasts.
4. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours. For added flavor, you can add boiled potatoes and paprika towards the end of cooking.
5. This recipe is suitable for using frozen boneless skinless chicken bags if desired. The canned soup base cannot be detected in the final dish, making it delicious!
